summary: Testability assessment: All new SDK methods are testable via HTTP integration tests (Task 2 scope). (1) Aliases — verify response matches original method response. (2) getOne — test with existing ID (returns object) and non-existent ID (returns null). (3) upsert — test create path (new keyField value), update path (existing keyField value), and undefined keyField edge case. (4) getMembers — test with owner JWT (should have isOwner:true on own entry) and non-owner (no isOwner flags). (5) removeMember — test successful removal, non-owner error (synchronous throw), missing email (graceful → still calls revokeAccess). (6) Backend GET /api/data/{col}/{id} — test existing item returns object, missing item returns null (HTTP 200). All edge cases from task spec are implementable as tests. npm run build passes — code compiles without TypeScript errors.
